results.title: Cal.com
results.description: Cal.com is the open-source Calendly successor, offering self-hosted or hosted scheduling infrastructure with full control over data, workflow, and appearance.

results.title: Cal.com
results.description: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling infrastructure that provides APIs for managing bookings, calendars, event types, user and team schedules, conferencing, and various organizational resources.

results.title: Cal.com API
results.description: The Cal.com API provides programmatic access to manage scheduling functionalities, including attendees, bookings, availabilities, event types, and more, with API key authentication.

results.title: Cal.com API v2
results.description: Cal.com API v2 provides endpoints for managing bookings, users, organizations, and webhooks for the Cal.com scheduling platform.

results.title: Cal-Heatmap
results.description: Cal-Heatmap is a JavaScript charting library for creating time-series calendar heatmaps with features like animated navigation, custom time intervals, and locale support.

results.title: Capital.com Library
results.description: Capital.com Library for anything

results.title: Shadcn Cal.com
results.description: A Next.js project bootstrapped with create-next-app, featuring optimized font loading and deployment on Vercel.

results.title: cppreference.com
results.description: cppreference.com is a comprehensive reference documentation for C and C++ programming languages, covering language features, standard library, and compiler support across multiple C++ standards.

results.title: cppreference.com
results.description: A comprehensive online reference for the C and C++ programming languages, including their standard libraries, language features, and technical specifications across various versions.

results.title: ical.js
results.description: A Javascript library for parsing iCalendar, jCal, vCard, and jCard formats, designed for web applications.

results.title: CGAL
results.description: The Computational Geometry Algorithms Library (CGAL) is a C++ library providing easy access to efficient and reliable algorithms in computational geometry.

results.title: Calico
results.description: Calico is a unified platform for Kubernetes networking, network security, and observability that works across any Kubernetes distribution in the cloud, on-premises, or at the edge.

results.title: Koala.jl
results.description: Koala.jl is a Julia library for studying nonlocal games and related topics, featuring algorithms for strategy finding and the NPA hierarchy for bounding game values.

results.title: Apache Calcite
results.description: Apache Calcite is a dynamic data management framework providing a SQL parser, validator, customizable optimizer, and adapters for executing queries over various data sources.

results.title: CCS - Claude Code Switch
results.description: CCS enables developers to instantly switch between multiple Claude accounts, GLM, and Kimi to run parallel workflows and eliminate rate limit interruptions.

results.title: Firely CQL SDK
results.description: Firely CQL SDK is NCQA's and Firely's official .NET SDK for working with Clinical Quality Language (CQL), providing an engine to execute ELM and convert ELM files into .NET assemblies.

results.title: You.com API
results.description: You.com API is a suite of tools that grounds LLM outputs in real-time, accurate web intelligence through AI agents, structured search results, and custom workflows.

results.title: Clay
results.description: Clay is a powerful data automation platform that enables users to find, enrich, transform, and export data, featuring web scraping, AI capabilities, and integrations for various workflows.

results.title: Kaml
results.description: Kaml is a Kotlin library that adds YAML support to kotlinx.serialization, enabling parsing and serialization of Kotlin objects to and from YAML format.

results.title: Cally
results.description: Cally is a small, feature-rich, and framework-independent calendar component with a minimal bundle size, full feature set, and accessibility in mind.

results.title: Table-Computing
results.description: Table-Computing (TC) is a distributed, lightweight, high-performance stream processing and data analysis framework designed for low latency and ease of use, offering significant resource savings and speed improvements over other frameworks.

results.title: CSLA
results.description: CSLA .NET is a framework for building reusable, maintainable object-oriented business layers, reducing application development and maintenance costs.

results.title: You.com Search API
results.description: The You.com Search API provides LLM-ready web results and news based on user queries, ideal for integrating search capabilities into AI applications.

results.title: Kali Linux
results.description: A Debian-based Linux distribution specifically designed for digital forensics and penetration testing, providing a comprehensive suite of security tools for various platforms and use cases.

results.title: Coalesce Transform
results.description: Coalesce Transform is a metadata-driven workspace for designing, building, and operating governed data pipelines on cloud data platforms, combining visual DAGs with code, templates, testing, and column-level lineage.

results.title: Claude AI学习仓库

results.title: Kool
results.description: Kool is a CLI tool that simplifies modern software development environments by making them lightweight, fast, and reproducible, reducing Docker complexity and offering simplified Kubernetes deployment.

results.title: CGAL
results.description: CGAL is a C++ library providing efficient and reliable computational geometry algorithms including triangulations, Voronoi diagrams, mesh generation, and geometric data structures.

results.title: Calva
results.description: Calva is a Clojure and ClojureScript IDE for Visual Studio Code, offering features like inline code evaluation, structural editing, debugging, and linting for a productive development experience.

results.title: Claude Relay Service
results.description: A self-hosted Claude API relay service designed to bypass regional restrictions, enhance privacy, and share costs, featuring multi-account management, custom API keys, and comprehensive usage monitoring.
